sn2.17:1.1: Standing to one side, Subrahma the deva’s son recited this verse to the Blessed One:
sn2.17:2.3: over duties1 that have yet to arise,
sn2.17:2.6: point it out to me, when asked.”
sn2.17:3.1: The Buddha: “Apart from the factors for awakening, austerity,
sn2.17:3.4: I see no safety for living beings.”
sn2.17:4.1: That is what the Blessed One said…
